debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
c : Circuit p (ZMod p)
h : rw_bisim c.eval (Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.to_cs p inst✝ (ZMod p) c))
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
ew : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w
⊢ Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e.eval = Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args

proof:
constructor
      · exact (bits_good w args e ew).1
      · exact congrArg Exp.eval (bits_good w args e ew).2
failed_attempts: exact bits_good w args e ew

have := bits_good w args e ew
      exact ⟨this.1, this.2⟩
exact bits_good w args e ew

constructor
      · exact (bits_good w args e ew).1
      · exact (bits_good w args e ew).2
exact bits_good w args e ew

have hgood := bits_good w args e ew
      exact ⟨hgood.1, by rw [hgood.2]⟩

have hb := bits_good w args e ew
      exact ⟨hb.1, by rw [hb.2]⟩
exact bits_good w args e ew
exact bits_good w args e ew

have hg := bits_good w args e ew
      exact ⟨hg.1, by rw [hg.2]⟩

have hb := bits_good w args e ew
      exact ⟨hb.1, by rw [← hb.2]⟩

have hbg := bits_good w args e ew
      exact ⟨hbg.1, by rw [hbg.2]⟩
exact bits_good w args e ew

constructor
      · exact (bits_good w args e ew).1
      · exact (bits_good w args e ew).2
successful_attempts:
constructor
      · exact (bits_good w args e ew).1
      · exact congrArg Exp.eval (bits_good w args e ew).2
